<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill in below. Small PRs land fast. -->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Why?

<!-- Use case, bug being fixed, gap being closed. Skip if it's a one-line typo. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new skill
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Integration recipe (other agent runtime)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Other

## How was this tested?

<!-- For code changes: how did you verify it works? For docs: did you proofread? For new integrations: did you actually run it end-to-end? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] If I changed a skill's behavior, I updated its `SKILL.md` and per-skill `README.md`
- [ ] If I added a dependency, I updated [INSTALL.md](../INSTALL.md) and [INSTALL.zh-CN.md](../INSTALL.zh-CN.md)
- [ ] If I added a new file, it doesn't contain any tokens, API keys, or personal paths
- [ ] If this is a new skill, I opened a discussion issue first and got a thumbs-up

## Anything else reviewers should know?
